name: PER_SENIORITY_DATES_F_
description: This is transactional table for storing seniority dates.

columns.Name: SENIORITY_DATE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the unique Id for Seniority Date Item

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: SENIORITY_DATE_CODE
columns.Comments: Code to identify the Seniority Date Item.Eg: ORA_ESD_P , ORA_JOB_SD_A

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier (ID) that identifies teh person this item belongs to.

columns.Name: ENTRY_DATE
columns.Comments: First date in which the seniority attribute value was first assigned to this person at the given level.

columns.Name: SENIORITY_DATE
columns.Comments: The actual seniority date value based on which the length of service will be calculated for day

columns.Name: BASE_SENIORITY_DATE
columns.Comments: Seniority Date from the previous date effective row, used as reference for offsetting seniority date in this row.

columns.Name: CALCULATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Mode of calculation Manual when created by user and  Automatic.when created by ESS

columns.Name: LEVEL_CODE
columns.Comments: Lookup code for the Seniority Level.

columns.Name: LEVEL_OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier (ID) that identifies the level object.

columns.Name: SENIORITY_FIELD
columns.Comments: Lookup code for the Triggering Field based on which this seniority is defined.

columns.Name: SENIORITY_FIELD_KEY
columns.Comments: Unified redundant column that combines all three seniority key fields - Number, Text, Date

columns.Name: RECORD_CREATOR
columns.Comments: Creator process of this record. For example, HDL, UI, and ESS.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier (ID) that identifies the enterprise

columns.Name: MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_DAYS
columns.Comments: Offset number of days by which the seniority date gets adjusted in this change.

columns.Name: TOTAL_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_DAYS
columns.Comments: Total offset number of days by which the seniority date gets adjusted by manual change in all changes till this point in time.

columns.Name: AUTO_ADJUSTMENT_DAYS
columns.Comments: Offset number of days by which the seniority date gets adjusted in this change.

columns.Name: TOTAL_AUTO_ADJUSTMENT_DAYS
columns.Comments: Total offset number of days by which the seniority date gets adjusted by auto change in all changes till this point in time.

columns.Name: TOTAL_ADJUSTMENT_DAYS
columns.Comments: Total offset number of days by which the seniority date gets adjusted by all sources of change till this point in time.

columns.Name: MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_HOURS
columns.Comments: Offset number of hours by which the seniority hours gets adjusted in this change.

columns.Name: TOTAL_MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_HOURS
columns.Comments: Total offset number of hours by which the seniority hours gets adjusted by manual change in all changes till this point in time.

columns.Name: AUTO_ADJUSTMENT_HOURS
columns.Comments: Offset number of hours by which the seniority hours gets adjusted in this change.

columns.Name: TOTAL_AUTO_ADJUSTMENT_HOURS
columns.Comments: Total offset number of hours by which the seniority hours gets adjusted by auto change in all changes till this point in time.

columns.Name: TOTAL_ADJUSTMENT_HOURS
columns.Comments: Total offset number of days by which the seniority hours gets adjusted by auto and manual sources of change till this point in time.

columns.Name: MANUAL_ADJUSTMENT_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Optional comments regarding the adjustment in the seniority date for manual change.

columns.Name: AUTO_ADJUSTMENT_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Optional comments regarding the adjustment in the seniority date for an auto change

columns.Name: GAP_IN_DAYS
columns.Comments: Gap in days in the occupation of the seniority field.

columns.Name: EXIT_DATE
columns.Comments: Last date in which the seniority attribute value was assigned to this person at the given level.

columns.Name: SENIORITY_HOURS
columns.Comments: Seniority Hours loaded from Seniority Hours table.

columns.Name: TOTAL_SENIORITY_HOURS
columns.Comments: Total offset number of days by which the seniority hours gets adjusted by all sources (auto,manual and seniority hours table) of change till this point in time.

columns.Name: LAST_SENIORITY_HRS_RUN_DATE
columns.Comments: Date of which the ESS process ran last for this item.

columns.Name: SENIORITY_HOURS_LOS
columns.Comments: Seniority Hours converted to Length of Service format

columns.Name: SENIORITY_LOS_YEARS
columns.Comments: Number of years in Seniority Hours converted to Length of Service format.

columns.Name: SENIORITY_LOS_MONTHS
columns.Comments: Number of months in Seniority Hours converted to Length of Service format.

columns.Name: SENIORITY_LOS_DAYS
columns.Comments: Number of days in Seniority Hours converted to Length of Service format.

columns.Name: SENIORITY_LOS_TOTAL_DAYS
columns.Comments: Seniority Hours converted to number of days.

columns.Name: LAST_ESS_RUN_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time of the last update of the row by last ESS run process.

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates the request Id of last ESS process which updated the record.

columns.Name: OVERLAPPING_PERIOD_IN_DAYS
columns.Comments: Days overlapping among two or more assignments of the same seniority attribute. (Reserved for future use)

columns.Name: MARKED_FOR_RECALCULATION
columns.Comments: Whether this item is marked for recalculation. (Reserved for future use)

columns.Name: SENIORITY_FIELD_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Number based unique identifier (ID) that identifies the field based on which this seniority date rule is configured. For example, JobID and PositionID.

columns.Name: SENIORITY_FIELD_DATE
columns.Comments: Date based unique identifier (ID) that identifies the field based on which this seniority date rule is configured. This is reserved for future use when such an attribute is integrated.

columns.Name: SENIORITY_FIELD_TEXT
columns.Comments: Text based unique identifier (ID) that identifies the field based on which this seniority date rule is configured. For example, LegislationCode.

columns.Name: ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
columns.Comments: An unique identifier that identifies the source of data in case of non UI sources. For HDL, data set id. For ESS, request id.

columns.Name: PREVIOUS_SENIORITY_DATE_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Id of seniority date item based on which this item is calculated. (Internal Use)

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
